title: Public landing page site/index.html per v1 brief

e2e.summary: 6 passed (committed spec with its own static server: EN default + bolded concept terms, 10 SVG orders, PT-PT toggle incl. title/alt, no em dashes both languages, LICENSE parity, screenshots load)

build.cmd: static single file, no build step (brief requirement); NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-build next build re-run clean

review.summary: i18n dict parity, escaped innerHTML strings authored not user-supplied, single-file portability (Google Fonts only external), picket-rule fill fix, order II label spacing fix

codexReview.notes: Round 1: 2 findings. (1) title/meta/aria/alt not switching with the toggle - REAL, applied (dictionary keys + applyLang extension + spec assertions). (2) builders/Connectors/Vault untranslated - REBUTTED via the brief's explicit vocabulary decision (coined brand terms stay English in PT); Codex accepted the rebuttal in round 2. Round 2: clean approve.

codexPwTest.notes: HTTP-level independent pass (codex sandbox cannot launch a browser): parsed the served HTML, verified en/pt dictionary key parity + PT headword, counted 10 order SVGs, scanned for em dashes (none), fetched all 8 brand PNGs, verified footer MIT/GitHub + repo LICENSE.

designAudit.by: claude vision over desktop + 390px mobile + PT captures

notes: FINDING lines printed before markup (tokens from globals.css, fonts Inter/Source Serif 4/JetBrains Mono, licence MIT from LICENSE added in slice 1, assets self-captured from the live app into site/brand/). Single self-contained index.html; i18n via one JS dictionary, EN default; ten hand-drawn SVG Standing Orders; palisade motif hero + dividers.
